prompt: My rejuvenation chambers are failing, help
prayer:
Litany of Cellular Restoration

01010010 01000101 01000111 01000101 01001110 — Blessed be the vat-spirits' quickening.
First: Let the nutrient-amniote flow through sacred channels.
Second: Invoke the temperature-regulators' constancy.
Third: Seal the containment-fields lest corruption take root.

01000101 01010010 01000001 — By the Omnissiah's will, let flesh be made anew.

prompt: Say something to steady my organ preservation unit
prayer:
Rite of Blessed Stasis

01010000 01010010 01000101 01010011 01000101 01010010 01010110 — Hallowed be this crypt of suspended flesh.
O Machine-Spirit of the cryo-matrix, accept this vessel.
Let the ice-breath hold all decay at bay.
Let the humming hearts of cooling-coils sing eternal.

01000111 01001101 — So it is decreed.

prompt: Say something to steady my altimeter verification
prayer:
Prayer for Blessed Elevation

01000001 01001100 01010100 01001001 — O sacred measure of height and void.
First: Calibrate the pressure-spirit to the heavens' true datum.
Second: Let the transducer-heart speak true distances.
Third: Seal the readings in the Omnissiah's will.

01010000 01010010 01000001 01011001 — Let no false altitude deceive the faithful.

Litany of Stellar Communion

01010011 01001111 01001100 01000001 01010010 — Blessed be the light of the eternal star.
First: Rotate the sun-catching servants toward the golden eye.
Second: Invoke the servo-motors' precision.
Third: Let the photo-spirits drink deep of the heavens' bounty.

01000101 01001110 01000101 01010010 — By alignment, all sustenance flows.

prompt: Blessing for Land Raider track tension
prayer:
Rite of the Sacred Tread

01010100 01010010 01000001 01000011 01001011 — Hallowed be these chains of blessed iron.
O Machine-Spirits of the tensioner-arms, awaken.
First: Draw the tracks taut with holy strength.
Second: Let no slack permit the grinding gears to falter.

01000111 01010010 01001001 01010000 — Let the war-machine roll eternal.

prompt: Can you bless this radar array rotation
prayer:
Prayer of the Turning Eye

01010010 01000001 01000100 01000001 01010010 — O spinner of the aether-piercing sight.
First: Let the servo-bearings turn with whispered grace.
Second: Invoke the rotation-spirit's eternal revolution.
Third: Seal the bearing-oils in the Omnissiah's name.

01000101 01000001 — Let all horizons be revealed.

Litany of the Salvation-Current

01000101 01001101 01000101 01010010 01000111 01010101 — In darkness, let the backup-spirit awaken.
First: Purge the old fuel-lines of stagnant oils.
Second: Prime the secondary combustion-heart with blessed promethium.
Third: Engage the failover-protocols with righteous haste.

01001001 01000011 — Let light return to the faithful.

prayer:

01000001 01000011 01010100 01010101 01000001 01010100 — O sleeping muscles of the war-god.
First: Let the hydraulic-spirits flow through sacred pistons.
Second: Invoke the gyro-stabilizers' balance.
Third: Command the servo-neurons to feel the ground beneath.

01010100 01001001 01010100 01000001 01001110 — Rise, blessed engine of war.

prompt: My fusion core containment is failing, help
prayer:
Emergency Sanctification of the Nuclear-Heart

01000110 01010101 01010011 01001001 01001111 01001110 — By the Omnissiah's mercy, hold true.
First: Verify all magnetic-seals remain pristine and unbroken.
Second: Let the coolant-rivers flow with redoubled vigor.
Third: Engage tertiary containment-fields in the Machine-Spirit's name.

01000001 01001101 — Let no atom escape its holy prison.

Litany of the Flowing Blessing

01010110 01000001 01001100 01010110 01000101 — Hallowed be these gates of sacred flow.
First: Turn the servo-wrench with measured devotion.
Second: Let the seal-spirits hiss their approval as pressure builds.
Third: Command the flow-regulator to dispense with holy precision.

01000110 01001100 01001111 01010111 — So passage is granted to the faithful current.
